title: scripts ¥u2014 Knowledge Summary
content: # scripts ¥u2014 Knowledge Summary¥n¥n> OKF v0.2 bundle | 18 concepts | 2 domains | 2 modules¥n¥n## Stats¥n¥n| Type | Count |¥n|------|-------|¥n| Function | 15 |¥n| Module | 2 |¥n| Class | 1 |¥n¥n| Language | Concepts |¥n|----------|----------|¥n| python | 18 |¥n¥n## Domain Map¥n¥nUse these links to navigate the bundle or prime an AI agent with focused context.¥n¥n### [convert_docs_to_okf.py](convert_docs_to_okf.py/index.md) ¥u2014 10 concepts¥n¥n- [convert_docs_to_okf](convert_docs_to_okf/index.md) (10 concepts) ¥u2014 Convert markdown documentation files to OKF v0.2 format.¥n¥n### [quizgen.py](quizgen.py/index.md) ¥u2014 8 concepts¥n¥n- [quizgen](quizgen/index.md) (8 concepts)¥n¥n## Key Concepts¥n¥nHighest-value concepts across all domains (Classes and Functions with rich descriptions).¥n¥n| Concept | Type | Module | Description |¥n|---------|------|--------|-------------|¥n| [NVIDIAEmbeddings](/quizgen/NVIDIAEmbeddings.md) | Class | `quizgen.py` | Custom NVIDIA embeddings that bypasses tiktoken tokenization¥u2026 |¥n| [infer_type_and_title](/convert_docs_to_okf/infer_type_and_title.md) | Function | `convert_docs_to_okf.py` | Infer OKF type and title from filename and content. |¥n| [extract_description](/convert_docs_to_okf/extract_description.md) | Function | `convert_docs_to_okf.py` | Extract first meaningful paragraph as description. |¥n| [extract_frontmatter](/convert_docs_to_okf/extract_frontmatter.md) | Function | `convert_docs_to_okf.py` | Extract existing YAML frontmatter if present. |¥n| [convert_file](/convert_docs_to_okf/convert_file.md) | Function | `convert_docs_to_okf.py` | Convert a single markdown file to OKF format. |¥n¥n## Usage with OpenCode¥n¥n```bash¥n# Prime full context¥nRUN cat ./okf_bundle/SUMMARY.md¥n¥n# Prime specific domain¥nRUN cat ./okf_bundle/convert_docs_to_okf.py/index.md¥n¥n# Find a concept¥nRUN find ./okf_bundle -name '<ConceptName>.md' | xargs cat¥n```

metadata.description: Top-level OKF summary: 18 concepts across 2 domains and 2 modules
